title: Scholars @ WCM — Phase 1 Functional Specification
summary: Phase 1 functional specification defining user-facing behavior of the Scholars @ WCM application: profiles, search index composition, self-edit, support, sitemap/SEO, and analytics instrumentation.
notes: Manifest-declared SPEC. Document contains multiple calibration TODOs flagged as open items (AOI relevance threshold, publication-type point weights, citation refresh cadence floor, completeness threshold, edit-event logging channel, service-desk target, character limit) — these are pending requirements/constraints, not locked decisions. One explicit 'Locked' marker in the doc body (numbered pagination, 20 per page) is a SPEC-level constraint, not an ADR-locked decision.
